overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic corporate plaza with towering skyscrapers, palm trees, and distinctive red Arasaka architecture. The player character moves from a covered walkway through an open sunlit plaza and under massive red structural beams, encountering pedestrians and a large security mech.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open sunlit plaza
pedestrian in red jacket passes close to camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily from shaded covered walkway into the bright open plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket and beige pants walking toward camera and passing by

tall glass and steel towers with spires dominating the skyline
tall palm trees lining the plaza
large light-colored stone tiles covering the ground
massive black and red corporate building with distinctive architecture

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete covered walkway with the camera moving forward into a bright, open corporate plaza. A pedestrian in a red jacket passes by closely as the scene opens up to reveal towering futuristic skyscrapers and palm trees. The ground is covered in large light-colored tiles, and the massive Arasaka building becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open corporate plaza with Arasaka building ahead

events.description: begins following a worker in a yellow safety vest toward the Arasaka building

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza toward the large red Arasaka building, following a worker in a yellow safety vest

notable_agents.action: construction worker in yellow safety vest and hard hat walking ahead toward the Arasaka building

entered.detail: illuminated white Arasaka corporate logo on the building facade
massive red horizontal structural beams connecting building sections
tall skyscraper with reflective glass windows

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the wide-open plaza under bright sunlight, approaching the distinctive red and black Arasaka building. The illuminated Arasaka logo becomes visible on the right as massive red structural beams come into view overhead. A worker in a yellow safety vest walks ahead, leading the way toward the corporate entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under red Arasaka structural beams

events.description: turns right at the intersection to enter the covered walkway under the red structure
enters the deeply shaded area under the massive red structural beams

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection to follow the sidewalk under the massive red structural beams of the Arasaka complex

notable_agents.action: worker in yellow safety vest continuing to walk ahead under the covered structure

entered.detail: black van parked along the curb
large concrete planter with green trees
dark entrance to the Arasaka building

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the plaza edge, transitioning from the open sunlit area into a covered walkway beneath massive red structural beams. The lighting shifts to mixed shadows as the camera follows the worker along the sidewalk. Parked vehicles and tree planters line the path as the Arasaka logo moves from the right to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: secure corridor under Arasaka building with security checkpoint

events.description: approaches the security mech and guard standing by the building wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk approaching a large security mech and armed guard

notable_agents.action: security guard standing next to a large bipedal mech

entered.detail: large bipedal combat mech with heavy armor plating
smooth black and red facade of the Arasaka building

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deeper under the Arasaka complex along a shaded corridor. The camera approaches a security checkpoint where a large armed mech stands next to a guard against the red building wall. The massive structural beams recede to the left as the camera passes the security detail and continues along the enclosed walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered concrete walkway into a bright corporate plaza that eventually leads deep into the shaded depths of a high-security complex. It begins by emerging from the cover of a walkway into a sunlit expanse of light-colored tiles, passing a pedestrian in a red jacket as towering skyscrapers and palm trees reveal themselves. As the camera advances toward the red and black Arasaka building, the open sunlight gives way to the imposing presence of massive red structural beams overhead. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right, transitioning from the bright plaza into a shadowed corridor lined with parked vehicles and tree planters. Finally, the movement continues deeper under the complex's architecture, passing a large armed security mech and a guard stationed against a red wall before proceeding along the enclosed walkway.
